item.title: Enjoy.

1 Bill Clinton Apologizes for MK Ultra, Human Experimentation: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jCqhT-T86gc
2 https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/factcheck/2020/06/30/fact-check-u-s-government-poisoned-some-alcohol-during-prohibition/3283701001/
3 https://www.thedossier.info/documents/operation-northwoods.pdf
4 https://allthatsinteresting.com/heart-attack-gun
5 https://www.usni.org/magazines/naval-history-magazine/2008/february/truth-about-tonkin
6 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Operation_Snow_White
7 https://allthatsinteresting.com/the-business-plot
8 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/COINTELPRO#Methods
9 https://www.nytimes.com/1977/12/26/archives/worldwide-propaganda-network-built-by-the-cia-a-worldwide-network.html
10 https://www.cdc.gov/tuskegee/about/timeline.html
11 https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CIA_involvement_in_Contra_cocaine_trafficking
12

item.title: MONDAY meme dump to help fix your mood (and mental health)
item.description:
1. My dude
2
3. They got her. They got her good!
4. How to confuse dogs
5. That's a lamp, you perv!
6
7. The 4K of the day
8. This cat is an aspiring food critic it seems
9. Dad and dog, a tale as old as time
10. Leave already damn it
11. Grading the paper of that one student again
12. Would you like some sauce with that pizza?
13
14. Thank you, cat!
15. As a final post I would like to ask you (if it's not too incontinent) to please wishlist my game on Steam so I can finally convince my parents that making weird indie games is a real job! Plus, every wishlist gets me one step closer to affording more instant noodles, which fuels the creativity behind this masterpiece. So help a dev out and click that little button—you’re not just wishlisting a game, you’re wishlisting my survival: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Hot Fuzz of the Ring
item.description: Hot Fuzz uncredited cameos trivia: the man dressed as Father Christmas stabbing Nicholas Angel (Simon Pegg) is Peter Jackson, and forensics investigator Janine, Angel's ex, is Cate Blanchett.

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
wait what
mmm hmm
that's kind of rude
shrooms are fun
it's ok the cig is not real
as is tradition
indeed
finally
no need to brag
someone spent time making this
i swear i'm also not a CIA asset
i have questions
case of the Mondays
try Zangief
dang (i didn't blackout the fuck)
you don't win friends with salad
sorry if you saw the last one (was removed).. still wanted to use a few of those images.. anyways have a great night gang!!

item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: So that was not much fun
item.description:
I was at work at a hospital, and we got WTFpwnd by a flood
I didn't have a phone with me, as mine was inside underwater in my locker, but I cribbed these photos from a dude that was up there on the roof with me.
That was out the front window right about when we figured out we were fucked.
The same area a couple minutes later from the roof. Water came up fast. Dam failed upstream.
Houses floating by. That road in the back is interstate 26.
View from the helicopter that extracted the dude with the camera. This entire area was dry ground normally. The river is usually a couple hundred yards to the left and it's only a couple of feet deep and maybe 15-20 feet wide. That's a lot of fucking water.
National Guard helicopter that got me off that roof. I was on this one. Dude whose pictures I'm posting was on the one before me so got my rescue photographed. Everyone got out safe which is a miracle. Medical staff and EMS did amazing work and busted their asses to keep everyone going. There was only one doctor there, and he carried a dementia patient up to the roof on his back and he wasn't young and she wasn't small. I loved that job. Planned to retire from there. It's just sinking in that I'll never go back and I'm going to have to find somewhere else to work for the next couple of years till I can retire. I'm glad we all got out OK, but all the people I want to share that joy with....were my coworkers who I don't work with anymore. That job is gone. RIP. On a lighter note, I was making schnitzel for lunch that day, and the pan full of pounded pork floated by right as I got on the helicopter out of there. I spent about an hour earlier that day pounding the crap out of pork to get it ready to pan fry, and after the walk in cooler floated away, that pan just hung out by us for a couple of hours, then took off down the river right as I got out of there. I hope the fishes appreciate the work that went into that pan. My marinade was epic.
item.dc:creator: mediumnonstickskillet

item.title: Schrödinger's AI
item.description: Searches made just seconds apart. Remember kids, just because the AI tells you what you want to hear, it doesn't mean it's answers are correct. It might just be pandering to you.

item.title: Rest weary traveler. There is still beauty in this godforsaken world. (Cake day post)
item.description: Sit, warm your tired bones and calm your troubled mind. With emotions running high with all the political posts around. Take a few minutes and enjoy some of my favorite places (and things)

item.dc:creator: pukeM

item.title: I'm not fat, I'm prepared: A Hurricane Helene dump
item.description:
Just sitting in the dark, eating my dinner and thinking about the fact I moved into the mountains to get away from hurricanes.
Dinner
I spent decades living in hurricane prone areas. I also participated in disaster relief following hurricanes on several occasions. So when I got sick and tired of hurricanes I moved to the mountains. I also picked a place that looked flood resistant. Darn if the hurricanes didn't find me. I'm fine, as is where I live. There's been no power, water or cellular service until today (Sunday). Still no power, but some of the traffic lights are working now. Sink holes are opening up now, swallowing roads. I'm sure the news is full of pictures but these might be new. I will be shutting my phone off to conserve battery, so it'll be a while before I answer any questions.
item.dc:creator: NotTheSameAnymore
